name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Big ideas and big goals
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
From the beginning, ours has been a campaign of big ideas and big goals.
After Tuesday night, the political establishment and corporate media all wondered how we'd respond. So we set another big goal, one most thought would be unattainable.
We said that we would try to raise $5 million in individual, small-dollar contributions from the time the polls opened until midnight tonight. **[Time is running out, but we are close enough to reaching that number if you add your $3 contribution right away.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full")**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full")**
Reaching this $5 million goal will ensure we have the resources we need to win next Tuesday's primaries and caucuses in Arizona, Idaho, and Utah. And if we do that, we'll be one step closer to the ultimate goal: winning this Democratic primary.
The second half of the primary starts now, and it's one where we hold a considerable number of advantages. If we can keep winning states and delegates, we're going to come back and win this primary. [**That 's why your $3 contribution before midnight is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-5m-goal?refcode=em160317s3-full")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: Rand Paul
subject: 19 trillion reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot,
You want to know why I'm running for
re-election?
I can give you over 19 trillion reasons: Our
national debt.
Although we currently spend roughly $7
million per minute and face a debt of over $19 trillion, and the
people of America struggle through the broken economy, Washington
continues to spend us into oblivion.
Like most conservatives, I believe the
country is headed in the wrong direction. Washington's
spending-as-usual tactics are risking our future every minute.

If you agree please
commit to a generous contribution TODAY!

I believe one of my most important roles in
the Senate is to fight for fiscal sanity. I'm willing recognize
that the greatest threat to our nation is a debt crisis caused by
cowardly politicians unwilling to be fiscally responsible.
This reckless habit of spending money we
don't have has gone on for far too long, and we must face fiscal
reality immediately. It's time to stop spending more than what
comes in.
It's that simple.
Every year I issue a Waste Report that
highlights the most egregious examples of reckless government
spending. Since I began publishing the Waste Report, I've
discovered that we have wasted taxpayer money on:

$6 million campaign to promote tourism in
Albania

$43 million gas station in Afghanistan

$15 million grant to allow a golf club
maker to do research in space

$50,000 Christmas tree television ads

$15.6 million grant to cover foreign
students' college tuition

$175 million study on sleep apnea riddled
with fraud

$450,000 grant to produce climate change
video games

$25,000 laundromat for the U.S. Forest
Service

$100,00 flower show for the National Park
Service

$380,000 study to investigate the
"Freshman 15″

$218,000 campaign to sterilize feral
coyotes and invasive burros

$15,000 grant for a conference on balding

That's right-despite our out-of-control debt
resulting in fewer Americans working than at any other time since
the Jimmy Carter administration, we're paying to study balding
and building an unusable gas station in a war zone.
There is clearly hundreds of millions of
dollars worth of pork barrel spending that can and should be
removed from our budget.
I've asked the budget committee to include my
proposed cuts in this year and with your support, I hope they
will.
I will always fight for responsible spending
for Kentucky and for this country. Will you stand with me by
donating $50, $25 or $100 today?

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY
>>

Or donate another
amount >>

name: Joe Sestak
subject: What Bob Casey's endorsement means
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171946a/3476a20e/c622117/2745a4d0/1596329318/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

I have had no politician's endorsement in this campaign. With Bob Casey's endorsement of my primary opponent today, it completes an all-inclusive rejection by Washington DC's and Pennsylvania's Democratic politicians of what I believe in, and stand for. I don't think it can just be about me (although I know I can be challenging). Bob Casey is too nice a man for that. Nor can it be my voting record or courage in standing up for the right votes at all times, as I unhesitatingly did -- from Obamacare to the Economic Stimulus bill. It certainly isn't my ability to work within the establishment ... for it was the Democratic Majority Leader, Steny Hoyer, who called me the "most productive" Congressman. And after servicing 18,000 constituents who flooded my District office for help up to 9 p.m. seven days a week during the recession, even my Republican district voted to re-elect me by 20 points despite my having no time for any media ads. I've doubted it was my refusal to "sit down" from running against Senator Specter after the Party leadership initially asked me to run against him in 2009 before he switched parties to become a Democrat. After all, that was 7 years ago. And I've doubted it was my refusal to pay "street money" to the party machine or my refusal to take lobbying jobs from the consultant class. For while our newspapers are filled too often in Pennsylvania with stories of self above service, there are nice people in office, like Bob. There aren't many veterans in Congress, and none who served 31 years and was a flag or general officer -- except me. Perhaps _that 's_ why ... I never grew up in politics. I grew up under the principle of being accountable for the men and women I lead -- it was always about them, above service to any officer senior to me. When a Senator once said, "Sestak, whenever I tell you anything, the only answer is to be 'yes,'" I could only think how a sailor might view me if he were ever to see me agree to such a command as his commanding officer -- and as assuredly a Pennsylvanian would shake her head, also, if I were ever to agree. More than anything, I want the trust of the people I will serve; that I am for them. It is why I have not asked for any politician's endorsement. Perhaps too many of our politicians in both parties have acquiesced ... and maybe that is why the general public -- from the old Tea Party to today's progressive Democrats -- have felt attracted to those who seem to break the system. They just want a public servant. Will you help me be one? | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171946a/3476a20e/c622117/2745a4df/1596329318/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0318FBb1")
---
Warmly,
Joe

_Born and raised in Delaware County, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak served in the Navy for 31 years. He served as a Congressman for Pennsylvania 's 7th Congressional District from 2007-2011. As a Congressman, Joe served on both the Armed Services and Education & Labor Committees, and was Vice Chairman of the Small Business Committee. According to the office of the House Historian, Joe is the highest-ranking former military officer ever to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. As an Admiral, he led a series of operational commands at sea, including Commander of an aircraft carrier battle group of 30 U.S. and allied ships with over 15,000 sailors and 100 aircraft that conducted operations in Afghanistan and Iraq. After 9/11, Joe was the first Director of "Deep Blue," the Navy's anti-terrorism unit that established strategic and operations policies for the "Global War on Terrorism." He served as President Clinton's Director for Defense Policy at the National Security Council in the White House, and also as the Deputy Chief of Naval Operations responsible for development of the Navy's five-year $350 billion warfare requirements. He holds a Ph.D. in Political Economy and Government from Harvard University. _ _Joe most recently taught courses on Ethical Leadership and on Restoring the American Dream at Carnegie Mellon University and Cheyney University, and was the General Omar N. Bradley Chair in Strategic Leadership, a joint faculty appointment at the United States Army War College, Dickinson College, and the Penn State University Dickinson School of Law and School of International Affairs. He also remained active in foreign affairs, education, disaster response, small businesses, energy and the environment, and health care, among other issues, through a variety of non-profits and other organizations, including the U.S Department of State. When he officially announced his bid for the U.S. Senate at Independence Hall, he walked 422 miles on foot from Philadelphia to the Ohio border in order to show people how he wanted to serve them, earning their trust by a willingness to be held accountable. Joe 's book, "Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream," focuses on the hopes and challenges he saw as he walked with people across Pennsylvania._
---

Joe 's book, "Walking in Your Shoes to Restore the American Dream," focuses on the hopes and challenges he saw as he walked with people across Pennsylvania. | "" "" "" | ---|---|--- | Friends of Joe Sestak P.O. Box 1936 Media, PA 19063 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | "" |

name: Tyler Foote
subject: You and your doctor
body:
Hey Peter, Do you want personalized health care at a lower cost? Direct Primary Care is a fee-for-service health care option that avoids the expensive insurance system.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Hey Peter,
Virginia legislators have passed a great reform that will allow our primary care doctors freedom from some unnecessary regulatory and licensing rules. Direct Primary Care (DPC) is a fee-for-service health care option that provides high quality individualized care. With more doctors able to practice DPC, consumers can obtain quality care for lower prices.
**[Tell Governor McAuliffe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97d6b6877feba63bcb73560ec4fde62c58cbdd64c26c084eea2d85964de8a1132fade02c5182bb36 "Tell Governor McAuliffe") ** to pass these reforms and lower the price of our health care!Not only does Direct Primary Care eliminate burdensome and expensive paperwork for doctors, but it also gives patients the freedom to choose the health care that works best for them.

Governor McAuliffe should look at every option available to lower health care costs for Virginians.

**[Tell the governor](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=97d6b6877feba63bd4a09ab9907d02bad723a90846c73e04fcb0bc4a3c37d63e440780b1cd395b07 "Tell the governor")** to pass these reforms so that you and your doctor can avoid red tape and high costs!

Thank you for taking action!

Tyler FooteState DirectorAmericans for Prosperity-VA

name: Rob Portman
subject: There is hope
body:
| Peter -- This morning, we released [our new web video](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman%2Fvideos%2Fvb.419067244881558%2F932351860219758%2F%3Ftype%3D2%26theater&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=1) that touches on my fight against the prescription drug and heroin epidemic that is tearing Ohio families apart. In the video, you’ll learn about my bipartisan legislation to help combat the prescription drug and heroin epidemic by providing support for Ohioans struggling with addiction. The Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act (CARA) expands education and prevention efforts, helps law enforcement reverse overdoses to save lives, and expands treatment and recovery programs. There is some hopeful news: just last week, CARA passed the U.S. Senate by an overwhelming margin, 94-1.

[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman%2Fvideos%2Fvb.419067244881558%2F932351860219758%2F%3Ftype%3D2%26theater&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=2) I’ve been crisscrossing Ohio learning about what we can do to fight this epidemic. In Toledo, I heard [stories of recovery](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.toledoblade.com%2FMedical%2F2015%2F11%2F21%2FSen-Portman-hears-of-recovery-from-drug-addiction.html&e=b7b7d93df9a6acebcc81bd31cc7e75b1&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=2&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=3) and what works and what doesn't. In Marion, [I heard from a family dealing with unimaginable loss ](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.marionstar.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2F2016%2F01%2F18%2Fportman-addresses-heroin-marion%2F78857248%2F&e=b7b7d93df9a6acebcc81bd31cc7e75b1&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=3&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=4)because of addiction. In Columbus, I visited Amethyst, Inc. and [met with women in long-term recovery](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fabc6onyourside.com%2Fnews%2Flocal%2Fsen-portman-speaks-to-drug-addicted-woman-in-ohio&e=b7b7d93df9a6acebcc81bd31cc7e75b1&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=4&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=5) from drug addiction. In Cleveland, [I saw compassionate care being given to babies](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwcpn.ideastream.org%2Fnews%2Fefforts-to-reduce-cases-of-pregnant-addicts-drug-dependent-newborns-continues&e=b7b7d93df9a6acebcc81bd31cc7e75b1&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=5&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=6) who were born addicted because their mothers were using while pregnant. People all across our state are hurting because of addiction. I hope you will take time to [watch our new web video](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman%2Fvideos%2Fvb.419067244881558%2F932351860219758%2F%3Ftype%3D2%26theater&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=7). As Ohioans and Americans, we must work together to turn the tide of addiction, help people put their lives back together, and end this epidemic!
All best,
Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=8)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=9)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=10)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hope_vid&n=11). -=-=-

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Pfizer
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I want to tell you about something that encapsulates so much of what is wrong with our economy, our government, and our corrupt political system. Then I'm going to ask for your help to stop it.
Pfizer is a giant pharmaceutical company based in New York City that has a history of overcharging Americans for prescription drugs. It's in the process of trying to merge with another company located in Ireland.
**If the merger is successful, Pfizer would technically become a foreign company, meaning it could dodge around $35 BILLION in corporate taxes here in America.**
Enough is enough. Pfizer and other pharmaceutical companies cannot be allowed to evade taxes and rip off American patients who already pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs.
[**I sent a letter to Treasury Secretary Jack Lew asking him to prevent Pfizer from taking many of the steps it wants in order to avoid paying taxes in America. Can you add your name to say you want Pfizer to pay the taxes it owes?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full")
**[Add your name»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full")**
What Pfizer is trying to do is known as a "corporate inversion." In this case, Pfizer, an American company, is merging with a company based abroad. The result of the merger is a company with an address in another country - even though the majority of shareholders are still based in America.
Pfizer apparently doesn't want to pay the $35 billion in taxes it would owe in America. I don't think that's right.
No matter what, you can bet that Pfizer would continue to overcharge Americans for prescription drugs, too. Since 2014, the pharmaceutical company has hiked the prices of seven of its top selling drugs by an average of 39 percent.
Pfizer also charges 12 times as much in the U.S. under Medicare for these drugs as it charges in Ireland, where it's claiming a new address for tax purposes.
All of this is the result of years of weakened tax laws, an abdication of responsibility by American companies to their country, and a corrupt political system that allows it to happen.
And I believe we can stop it.
[**Add your name and together we can stop Pfizer's corporate tax dodge and take a big step forward for our political revolution.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/pfizer-must-pay-taxes?source=em160318full")
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160318pfizer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160318pfizer")**

clean_body: Sisters and Brothers - I want to tell you about something that encapsulates so much of what is wrong with our economy, our government, and our corrupt political system. Then I'm going to ask for your help to stop it. Pfizer is a giant pharmaceutical company based in New York City that has a history of overcharging Americans for prescription drugs. It's in the process of trying to merge with another company located in Ireland. If the merger is successful, Pfizer would technically become a foreign company, meaning it could dodge around $35 BILLION in corporate taxes here in America. Enough is enough. Pfizer and other pharmaceutical companies cannot be allowed to evade taxes and rip off American patients who already pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs. "" "" What Pfizer is trying to do is known as a "corporate inversion." In this case, Pfizer, an American company, is merging with a company based abroad. The result of the merger is a company with an address in another country - even though the majority of shareholders are still based in America. Pfizer apparently doesn't want to pay the $35 billion in taxes it would owe in America. I don't think that's right. No matter what, you can bet that Pfizer would continue to overcharge Americans for prescription drugs, too. Since 2014, the pharmaceutical company has hiked the prices of seven of its top selling drugs by an average of 39 percent. Pfizer also charges 12 times as much in the U.S. under Medicare for these drugs as it charges in Ireland, where it's claiming a new address for tax purposes. All of this is the result of years of weakened tax laws, an abdication of responsibility by American companies to their country, and a corrupt political system that allows it to happen. And I believe we can stop it. "" Thank you for your support. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
